keyPoints: 2.3: Matrix operations like +, -, *, / are done element-wise.
2.4: The c() function is used to combine vectors into a single vector.
2.5: The rbind() and cbind() functions are used to combine matrices.
2.6: The paste() function is used to combine strings.
2.7.2: The paste() function can also be used to combine lists and vectors.
2.8.2: Dates and times are represented as Date and time objects.
2.7.2.1: The as.Date() function is used to convert date strings to Date objects.
